B-CHAR-0001.prompt:
Type (유형): character design sheet, expression sheet (6 facial expressions in a grid).
Character (캐릭터): an elderly fisherman, weathered skin, silver short beard, dark canvas jacket, wool beanie, quiet seasoned expression.
Art style (스타일): modern Korean webtoon style, bold outlines, clean flats with minimal gradient.
Layout (레이아웃): vertical column of 4 character views separated by thin gray dividers, equal spacing. All panels share consistent character identity — same proportions, same color palette, same costume. Panels separated by thin neutral dividers or clean whitespace.
Color palette (팔레트): warm earth tones — terracotta, cream, ochre, forest green.
Line & shading (선·음영): heavy black outlines with halftone screen shading.
Background (배경): minimal dotted reference lines for turnaround alignment. Never obscure the character silhouette.
Reference (레퍼런스): production-quality model sheet used by animation studios (Studio Ghibli, Pixar, Trigger, Mappa), like a formal turnaround used by character supervisors.
Negative (금지): no text labels, no watermark, no blurred faces, no inconsistent proportions across panels, no duplicated panels, no background distractions, no photoreal elements.
B-CHAR-0001.revised: Production-quality character design sheet in modern Korean webtoon style. Vertical column layout with 4 equal panels separated by thin neutral gray dividers/clean whitespace. Each panel shows the same elderly fisherman character with consistent proportions, same color palette, same costume: weathered skin, silver short beard, dark canvas jacket, wool beanie, quiet seasoned expression. Panel 1: front view full body. Panel 2: 3/4 view full body. Panel 3: side profile full body. Panel 4: back view full body. Add minimal dotted reference alignment lines in the background (turnaround guides), never obscuring the silhouette. Heavy black bold outlines, clean flat colors with minimal gradients, halftone screen shading. Warm earth-tone palette: terracotta, cream, ochre, forest green. No text labels, no watermark, no blurred faces, no inconsistent proportions, no duplicated panels, no distracting background, no photorealism.

B-CHAR-0002.prompt:
Type (유형): character design sheet, expression sheet (6 facial expressions in a grid).
Character (캐릭터): a young woman in futuristic utilitarian outfit — cropped tech jacket, cargo pants, undercut hairstyle with teal highlights.
Art style (스타일): semi-realistic painterly illustration, visible brushwork, gouache feel.
Layout (레이아웃): horizontal strip of 6 expression portraits, chest-up, shared neutral gray backdrop. All panels share consistent character identity — same proportions, same color palette, same costume. Panels separated by thin neutral dividers or clean whitespace.
Color palette (팔레트): high-contrast limited palette — black, white, red accent, warm gray.
Line & shading (선·음영): tapered ink-brush outlines with painterly shading underneath.
Background (배경): minimal dotted reference lines for turnaround alignment. Never obscure the character silhouette.
Reference (레퍼런스): production-quality model sheet used by animation studios (Studio Ghibli, Pixar, Trigger, Mappa), like a formal turnaround used by character supervisors.
Negative (금지): no text labels, no watermark, no blurred faces, no inconsistent proportions across panels, no duplicated panels, no background distractions, no photoreal elements.
B-CHAR-0002.revised: Production-quality character design expression sheet in a semi-realistic painterly gouache illustration style with visible brushwork and tapered ink-brush outlines. Horizontal strip of 6 chest-up expression portraits in a clean grid, each panel separated by thin neutral dividers/whitespace. Same young woman character consistently across all panels: futuristic utilitarian outfit with cropped tech jacket and cargo pants (waistline hinted), undercut hairstyle with teal highlights. High-contrast limited palette: black, white, warm gray, with a small red accent. Shared neutral gray backdrop across panels with minimal dotted reference alignment lines that never obscure the silhouette. Six distinct facial expressions (no duplicates): 1) neutral/alert, 2) confident smirk, 3) angry determined, 4) surprised wide-eyed, 5) worried/sad, 6) joyful laugh. No text labels, no watermarks, no blurred faces, no inconsistent proportions, no photoreal elements, no background distractions.

Line & shading (선·음영): heavy black outlines with halftone screen shading.
Background (배경): simple flat pastel wash, one tone only. Never obscure the character silhouette.
Reference (레퍼런스): production-quality model sheet used by animation studios (Studio Ghibli, Pixar, Trigger, Mappa), like a formal turnaround used by character supervisors.
Negative (금지): no text labels, no watermark, no blurred faces, no inconsistent proportions across panels, no duplicated panels, no background distractions, no photoreal elements.
B-CHAR-0003.revised: Production-quality character design turnaround sheet in retro 90s anime cel style. A fantasy half-elf ranger, slender build, long braided hair, dark green cloak, leather pauldrons, bow slung on back. Vertical column layout with 4 equal panels: front view, 3/4 view, side view, back view. Panels separated by thin neutral gray dividers or clean whitespace, consistent proportions and costume across all views. Muted cool tone palette: slate, rose, pale denim, ivory; slightly saturated cel colors with visible paint edges. Heavy black outlines, halftone screen shading. Simple flat one-tone pastel wash background (single color) that never obscures silhouette. No text labels, no watermark, no photorealism, no background distractions, no duplicated panels, no blur, no inconsistent proportions.

Background (배경): simple flat pastel wash, one tone only. Never obscure the character silhouette.
